chunks.title: Wisdom on Wine and Quarreling
chunks.reason: Three distinct proverbs contrasting wisdom with folly regarding drink and disputes.

chunks.title: The Sluggard and Faithful Men
chunks.reason: Three proverbs addressing laziness, self-praise, and the rarity of faithfulness.

chunks.title: Righteousness and Kingship
chunks.reason: Three proverbs focusing on the legacy of the righteous and the role of a just king.

chunks.title: Commerce and Deceit
chunks.reason: Four proverbs concerning honest weights, youth conduct, sensory gifts, and buyer deception.

chunks.title: Value of Knowledge and Guarantors
chunks.reason: Three proverbs comparing material wealth to knowledge, warning about pledges, and the taste of deceit.

chunks.title: Counsel and Family Honor
chunks.reason: Three proverbs on establishing plans through counsel, avoiding slanderers, and cursing parents.

chunks.title: Inheritance and Divine Sovereignty
chunks.reason: Four proverbs warning against hasty wealth, urging trust in God, and affirming His control over steps.

chunks.title: Vows and Royal Justice
chunks.reason: Four proverbs regarding rash vows, the king as a winnowing agent, God's search of the heart, and royal virtues.

chunks.title: Strength of Youth and Discipline
chunks.reason: Two proverbs contrasting the honor of youth with age and the cleansing power of physical discipline.
